highlight.title: Explore
highlight.content: Emphasizes web search during exploration, injecting a chain-of-thought that checks ground truth source dates and resolves conflicts by recency.

additions.label: Write Plan
additions.description: Triggers structured plan template when writing the plan file
additions.effect: Ensures plans follow a reviewable, consistent structure

additions.label: Plan Writing Harness
additions.description: Enforces use of write-plan skill before writing plan files
additions.effect: Prevents ad-hoc planning by requiring template compliance

highlight.title: Plan
highlight.content: Explains the plan with diagrams and before/after comparisons.

comparison.after: Before/after comparison. Explicit diagrams for algorithms and workflow.

additions.label: Parallelism Reminder
additions.description: Reminds to spawn subagents for independent tasks
additions.effect: Maximizes concurrent execution of independent work

additions.label: Parallelism Reminder
additions.description: Reminds to spawn subagents for independent tasks
additions.effect: Maximizes concurrent execution of independent work

highlight.title: Task
highlight.content: Every user prompt triggers a reminder to spawn subagents for independent tasks, ensuring maximum throughput without manual orchestration.

additions.label: Blind Auditor
additions.description: Spawns a blind auditor subagent to verify each task before its successors run.
additions.effect: Catches defects at task granularity instead of after the whole plan.

highlight.title: Per-Task Implement-and-Audit
highlight.content: Each task is implemented by one subagent and verified by a separate blind auditor against its acceptance criteria. Successors run only after the audit passes; failures are logged and surfaced in a final audit table.
